subject: Ends today! 50% off for 26 Weeks on a Times Subscription
body:
View in browser:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/1996db230layfousuansxogqaaaaaazy52vsqsj2qqmyaaaaa/C?V=bF9pbmRleAEBcHJvZmlsZV9pZAExNzMwMDA4NDIxAVJFR0lfSUQBNDcyNzUyNjEBemlwX2NvZGUBAV9XQVZFX0lEXwExNTM1NzE0NTkBX1BMSVNUX0lEXwEyNTYwMTgxAWdfaW5kZXgBAWVtYWlsX2FkZHIBamVlcHJvamVjdEB5YWhvby5jb20BX1NDSERfVE1fATIwMTMxMjAyMTMwMDAwAXByb2ZpbGVfa2V5AWplZXByb2plY3RAeWFob28uY29t&YwLGFPkRYqqh7jO79qH/rw

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

Act now -- our biggest sale of the year ends today. 

LAST CHANCE TO SAVE 50% FOR 26 WEEKS ON
A TIMES SUBSCRIPTION

Get it for yourself. Or as a gift. Ends today! 

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/17a798664layfousuansxogyaaaaaazy52vsqsj2qqmyaaaaa 

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear NYTimes.com Reader, 

Today's the last day of The Times's Black Friday/Cyber Monday 
sale -- our biggest sale of the year. Don't miss out on this 
chance to save 50% for a full 26 weeks on a digital or home 
delivery subscription for yourself or as a gift. Lock in 
extended savings as you or your gift recipient stay fully 
informed about politics, business, the arts, dining and more, 
with in-depth articles and innovative multimedia. 

Choose from digital subscription options that include full 
access to NYTimes.com and our smartphone or tablet apps,
or both. 

Or select one of our convenient home delivery options, such as 
7-day delivery, The Weekender or Sunday delivery. All home 
delivery options come with FREE, unlimited access to NYTimes.com 
and our apps. 

Either way, you or your gift recipient will stay on top of all 
the news, covered by more than 1,000 of the world's 
finest journalists.

HURRY! SALE ENDS TODAY!*

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/1680cafd9layfousuansxohaaaaaaazy52vsqsj2qqmyaaaaa 

*****

Unlimited access to:

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/18b189b8dlayfousuansxohiaaaaaazy52vsqsj2qqmyaaaaa 

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

*This sale expires on December 3, 2013, 9 a.m. E.T. 

Promotional offers valid for new subscriptions only. New York 
Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader 
editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords 
apps. Smartphone and tablet apps are not supported on
all devices. 

Home Delivery Subscription options are available at the 
introductory rate of 50% off the regular rate for the first 26 
weeks. This introductory offer is valid only in areas served by 
The New York Times delivery service to readers who have not had 
home delivery of The New York Times within the past 90 days. At 
the end of your introductory period, delivery will continue at 
the regular rate unless you notify us otherwise. Prices are 
subject to change. Product availability and price may vary 
by region. 

Digital and home delivery subscriptions will automatically renew 
and the credit card will be charged in advance of each 4-week 
billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, 
refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale 
policy. Other restrictions and taxes may apply. 

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please 
add nytimes@email.newyorktimes.com to your address book. 

The New York Times:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/17555c130layfousuansxohqaaaaaazy52vsqsj2qqmyaaaaa

Privacy Policy:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/19641f564layfousuansxohyaaaaaazy52vsqsj2qqmyaaaaa 

Contact Us:
help@nytimes.com

Act now — our biggest sale of the year ends today.

Dear NYTimes.com Reader,

Today’s the last day of The Times’s Black Friday/Cyber Monday sale — our biggest sale of the year. Don’t miss out on this chance to save 50% for a full 26 weeks on a digital or home delivery subscription for yourself or as a gift. Lock in extended savings as you or your gift recipient stay fully informed about politics, business, the arts, dining and more, with in-depth articles and innovative multimedia.

Choose from digital subscription options that include full access to NYTimes.com and our smartphone or tablet apps, or both.

Or select one of our convenient home delivery options, such as 7-day delivery, The Weekender or Sunday delivery. All home delivery options come with FREE, unlimited access to NYTimes.com and our apps.

Either way, you or your gift recipient will stay on top of all the news, covered by more than 1,000 of the world’s finest journalists.

HURRY! SALE ENDS TODAY!*


You received this email because you are a registered user of The New York Times.

*This sale expires on December 3, 2013, 9 a.m. E.T.

Promotional offers valid for new subscriptions only. New York Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Smartphone and tablet apps are not supported on all devices.

Home Delivery Subscription options are available at the introductory rate of 50% off the regular rate for the first 26 weeks. This introductory offer is valid only in areas served by The New York Times delivery service to readers who have not had home delivery of The New York Times within the past 90 days. At the end of your introductory period, delivery will continue at the regular rate unless you notify us otherwise. Prices are subject to change. Product availability and price may vary by region.

Digital and home delivery subscriptions will automatically renew and the credit card will be charged in advance of each 4-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please add nytimes@email.newyorktimes.com to your address book.
